title: We Shouldnt Fight The Fed Even If Its Not Independent
section_path: We Shouldnt Fight The Fed Even If Its Not Independent
section_path_text: We Shouldnt Fight The Fed Even If Its Not Independent
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week
US inflation rose again to 2.9% from 2.7%, increasing pressures on the economy. Despite that, markets are now pricing in three rate cuts by the end of the year, a result of rising unemployment and pressures from the White House. We believe that, while three cuts may not necessarily be delivered, the Fed is on course to reduce the cost of money.
